383.reason: [This condition should be `position >= sourceCode.get(line).length()` to correctly detect end of line; current logic skips last character when position == length - 1]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition should be `position >= sourceCode.get(line).length()` to correctly detect end of line; current logic skips last character when position == length - 1]

395.reason: [Incorrect end condition: should also check if current line is within bounds and position is beyond current line's length; as written, it allows accessing sourceCode.get(line) when line == sourceCode.size(), causing IndexOutOfBoundsException]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect end condition: should also check if current line is within bounds and position is beyond current line's length; as written, it allows accessing sourceCode.get(line) when line == sourceCode.size(), causing IndexOutOfBoundsException]

396.reason: [This condition fails to correctly detect end-of-input when at the last line but beyond its length; it should also check if `line == sourceCode.size()` or handle empty lines properly, leading to potential IndexOutOfBoundsException or incorrect EOF handling]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition fails to correctly detect end-of-input when at the last line but beyond its length; it should also check if `line == sourceCode.size()` or handle empty lines properly, leading to potential IndexOutOfBoundsException or incorrect EOF handling]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition fails to correctly detect end-of-input when at the last line but beyond its length; it allows accessing sourceCode.get(line) even when line == sourceCode.size(), causing IndexOutOfBoundsException or incorrect behavior. Also, getChar() returns '\n' and increments line without checking if line is already beyond bounds, leading to invalid state.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition fails to account for the case when `line == sourceCode.size() - 1` but `position` has already exceeded the current line's length, leading to an IndexOutOfBoundsException in `getChar()` when accessing `sourceCode.get(line)` after `line` was incremented beyond valid bounds. Additionally, `isEnd()` returns true only after `line` exceeds size, but `getChar()` may try to access `sourceCode.get(line)` when `line == sourceCode.size()`, causing crash.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition fails to correctly detect end-of-input when at the last line but beyond its length; it should also check if `line == sourceCode.size()` or handle empty lines properly, leading to potential IndexOutOfBoundsException or incorrect EOF handling]
